title: misch origins, Servant
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c35c44ab4b3a66eaa48e5752a7e2744d5663f5a_0.webp)

# about the pack

, choose to spawn as a Servant

, find a new master... serve them well...

_, dont forget to download the resourcepack_

![Servant Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3bc753a5c0e69043cc2ea5b7aa55d20664ae8ef_0.webp)

![Servant GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd483966cd9607e47a9d048dff2d2380a10c92ad.png)

![Additional Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53dd77347171c5424df40bf8a33f68ff449f5d46_0.webp)

# notes
, the Knife obtained from the Banded Knife on your off-hand can't be lost

, the Bell item makes the player who hold them your Master, you can't take the bell away !

, it can't be dropped on death, the bell will remain safe...

, only 1 Servant per world please !

![Servant Drawing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ba24492c8dceb70d872b32e9fc35491ae3f4cf.png)
